known_vulnerabilities.title: Missing whitelist/owner check in deposit()
known_vulnerabilities.description: deposit() lacks whitelist or owner check, allowing any address to deposit

known_vulnerabilities.title: Missing onlyOwner on emergencyUnpause()
known_vulnerabilities.description: emergencyUnpause() has no access control, allowing anyone to unpause

known_vulnerabilities.title: Reentrancy in withdraw()
known_vulnerabilities.description: withdraw() violates CEI pattern with external call before state update
